_about: Current injury and suspension news for active competitions. Per team, a list of absent players with a description and source. The serving layer looks each player up in the fitted PlayerDeltas artifact (built from StatsBomb lineup data) and subtracts their learned attack/defense contribution from their team's effective strength. No tier or multiplier needed — the magnitude comes from the model.

Spain.issue: hurt his adductor against Uruguay and is a doubt for the knockouts
sprained his shoulder against Uruguay and may miss the rest of the tournament

England.issue: has a hamstring problem and is expected to miss the next couple of games
is a fitness doubt after being rested
